description_long: This is a pair of high-top sneakers crafted from dark brown synthetic leather with subtle black accents. The shoes feature a padded collar and tongue for added comfort and ankle support, as well as a reinforced toe cap and heel. The lacing system uses metal eyelets and standard criss-cross laces, providing a secure fit. Decorative stitching and paneling add visual interest to the sides, while the outsoles are made of black rubber, designed for urban traction. The interior appears to be lined with a softer material for comfort. These shoes are suitable for casual wear in urban environments, offering both style and functionality.
description: A pair of dark brown high-top sneakers with black rubber soles, padded collars, and standard criss-cross laces. The shoes feature synthetic leather construction with decorative stitching and paneling.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the lacing system, padded collar, and decorative side paneling.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the padded heel and collar, as well as the back seam and heel reinforcement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the side paneling, stitching, and the full length of the black rubber sole.
description_view_3: Angled front view emphasizing the toe cap, laces, and the overall shape of the shoes.
